title.description: Dzina la pulogalamu likuwonetsedwa pa mutu. Pulogalamu ya kupeza mapangidwe a chakudya cha dziko lonse.

subtitle.text: Pezani mapangidwe a chakudya kuchokera padziko lonse
subtitle.description: Malemba omwe amawonetsedwa pansi pa dzina la pulogalamu pa mutu.

heroTitle.description: Mutu waukulu pa gawo la tsamba loyamba.

heroSubtitle.text: Sankhani mapangidwe enieni kuchokera m'nyumba zosiyanasiyana padziko lonse
heroSubtitle.description: Malemba owerengera oonekera pansi pa mutu waukulu pa tsamba loyamba.

featuredTitle.description: Mutu wa gawo likuwonetsedwa pamwamba pa grid ya makadi a mapangidwe.

cookingTime.description: Malemba a nthawi yophikira pa kadikadi ka mapangidwe. {minutes} imasinthidwa ndi chiwerengero cha mphindi.

difficulty.description: Malemba omwe amawonetsedwa pamaso pa mulingo wa zovuta pa kadikadi ka mapangidwe.

easy.description: Mulingo wa zovuta ukuwonetsa mapangidwe osavuta.

medium.description: Mulingo wa zovuta ukuwonetsa mapangidwe ovuta pang'ono.

hard.description: Mulingo wa zovuta ukuwonetsa mapangidwe ovuta.

ramenName.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Tonkotsu Ramen.

ramenDescription.text: Msuzi wa mkaka wa mafupa a ng'ombe wokhala ndi chashu yofewa, dzira lofewa, ndi mtedza watsopano.
ramenDescription.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Tonkotsu Ramen.

margheritaName.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Pizza ya Margherita.

margheritaDescription.text: Pizza ya Neapolitan yakale yokhala ndi ma tomati a San Marzano, mozzarella watsopano, ndi basil.
margheritaDescription.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Pizza ya Margherita.

tacosName.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos a nyama ya nkhumba yophika ndi maapulo a pineapple, cilantro, ndi anyezi pa mkate wa chimanga.
tacosDescription.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenName.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Butter Chicken.

butterChickenDescription.text: Nkhuku yofewa mu msuzi wa tomato ndi batala wokhala ndi zonunkhira zokoma.
butterChickenDescription.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Butter Chicken.

padThaiName.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Pad Thai.

padThaiDescription.text: Mtedza wa mpunga wokazinga wokhala ndi nsomba, tofu, ma peanut, ndi msuzi wa tamarind.
padThaiDescription.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Pad Thai.

crepesName.description: Dzina la mapangidwe a Crepes za ku France.

crepesDescription.text: Crepes ochepa, ofewa okhala ndi Nutella, strawberi watsopano, ndi kirimu wopukutidwa.
crepesDescription.description: Kufotokozera kwa mapangidwe a Crepes za ku France.

label.description: Dzina lopezeka kwa wosankha chilankhulo mu chikwatu cha mutu.

en.description: Kusankha chilankhulo cha Chingerezi mu wosankha chilankhulo.

ja.description: Kusankha chilankhulo cha Chijapani mu wosankha chilankhulo.

es.description: Kusankha chilankhulo cha Chisipanishi mu wosankha chilankhulo.
